name: followup
description: Post-treatment follow-up companion: checks in on the patient after starting a treatment, tracks medication side effects over time, and escalates serious reactions early. Supportive monitoring, not a diagnosis.

skills.name: Post-treatment side-effect check-in
skills.description: Conversational follow-up that detects, assesses, and logs medication side effects, escalating dangerous ones early.
examples: Check in on how I'm doing with my medication
I've been feeling nauseous since starting metformin
Track my side effects after treatment
I started feeling muscle pain and weakness on my new medicine
